Nope (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $123,277,080Details
International Box Office $48,655,002
Worldwide Box Office $171,932,082
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,036,764
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,744,401
Total $4,781,165
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two siblings who run a California horse ranch discover something wonderful and sinister in the skies above, and the owner of an adjacent theme park tries to profit from the mysterious, otherworldly phenomenon.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$44,366,910 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$68,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,785 opening theaters/3,807 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $140,018,411

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 22nd, 2022 (Wide) by Universal

Video Release: September 20th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
